# SEOSH.AI

> AI-powered SEO automation platform for Russian-speaking markets — turns keyword research into published, optimized content on autopilot. Built for SMB owners, agencies, and SEO specialists who want a single tool covering the full workflow from semantic core to scheduled publication.

## Product

- [SEOSH.AI Landing](https://seosh.aijam.pro/landing): Overview of the platform, core features, and use cases.
- [Get Started — Sign Up](https://seosh.aijam.pro/landing#cta): Create an account and onboard your first project in under 5 minutes.
- [Try the Demo](https://seosh.aijam.pro/landing): One-click demo mode with a pre-filled SEO project (no signup required).

## Features

- **Semantic Core**: Bulk keyword research, automatic lexical grouping (clustering), and category-based organization. Imports keywords from CSV or generates from a seed list using AI.
- **Content Planner**: Visual editorial calendar mapping keywords to content items, with status workflow (Draft → Generated → Optimized → Review → Scheduled → Published) and team collaboration.
- **AI Content Editor**: Built-in markdown editor with on-demand AI generation, SEO scoring, readability analysis, and one-click optimization powered by OpenRouter.
- **Autopilot**: Auto-approve or Telegram-bot approval flow for ready content. Schedules publishing at custom intervals (1/day, 3/week, 1/week, 2/week) and publishes via connected CMS.
- **WordPress Publisher**: Direct REST API integration. Connect any WP site via Application Password and publish drafts or live posts on schedule.
- **Multi-Project Workspace**: Manage multiple SEO projects in a single account with team invites and role-based access (Owner, Editor, Viewer).

## Pricing

- [Billing & Plans](https://seosh.aijam.pro/billing): Pay-as-you-go token packages via YooKassa. No subscriptions — buy AI generation credits as you need them.

## Legal

- [Public Offer Agreement](https://seosh.aijam.pro/legal/offer): Terms of service (RU).
- [Privacy Policy](https://seosh.aijam.pro/legal/privacy): How user data is collected, stored, and processed.
- [Payment Terms](https://seosh.aijam.pro/legal/payment): Payment processing and billing rules.
- [Refund Policy](https://seosh.aijam.pro/legal/refund): Conditions and procedures for refunds.
